title: motioNO
description: Stops Minecraft from changing the FoV when running, using potions and bows, etc.
body:
This client-side mod stops Minecraft from changing the Field of View when running, using potions and bows, etc.

# **Since 1.16.2, Minecraft now has this feature built in! You can find the FOV Effects slider in Accessibility Settings - just change it to Off to replicate what this mod does.**

Mod Menu can be used to toggle this setting in game.
